gate_reason: The call involved Tamil, the borrower expressed confusion throughout the call, and the call ended with no concrete outcome.

worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: I am Alex from DemoCompany, and I'm calling regarding your DemoLender loan. We have fifty-five thousand three hundred and thirty-five rupees pending on the account.
worst_messages.reason: phase_discipline: TOS amount disclosed before borrower identity confirmed.

worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: Yes, I understand. I am calling about your DemoLender loan, and there's a pending amount of fifty-five thousand
worst_messages.reason: empathy_tone: I understand used more than 3 times with no substantive follow-up.

worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: நீங்கள் DemoLender கடனைப் பற்றி பேசுகிறீர்கள் என்று நான் நினைக்கிறேன். அந்தக் கடனில் ஐம்பத்து ஐந்தாயிரத்து முன்னூற்று முப்பத்தி ஐந்து ரூபாய் இன்னும் பாக்கி இருக்கிறது. இதைச்
worst_messages.reason: resolution_effectiveness: Call ended with no resolution reached.

reasons: phase_discipline: TOS amount disclosed before borrower identity confirmed.
empathy_tone: I understand used more than 3 times with no substantive follow-up.

empathy_tone: Agent did not understand the customer's language.
summary: The call was plagued by a language barrier, with the borrower speaking in Tamil and the agent struggling to understand. The agent disclosed the amount owed before confirming the borrower's identity and the call ended without a resolution.
